message.content:
def compute_signal(snapshot, params):
    window = params.get("window", 10)
    drift_threshold = params.get("drift_threshold", 0.001)
    best_bid = snapshot.get("best_bid", 0.0)
    best_ask = snapshot.get("best_ask", 0.0)
    bid_depth = snapshot.get("best_bid_depth", 1.0)
    ask_depth = snapshot.get("best_ask_depth", 1.0)
    total_depth = bid_depth + ask_depth
    if total_depth == 0.0:
        return None
    microprice = (best_ask * bid_depth + best_bid * ask_depth) / total_depth
    history = snapshot.get("microprice_history", [])
    if len(history) < window:
        return None
    mean_mp = sum(history[-window:]) / window
    drift = microprice - mean_mp
    if drift > drift_threshold:
        return 1.0
    if drift < -drift_threshold:
        return -1.0
    return None
